sourceMovie.title: Kaguya-sama: Love Is War -The First Kiss That Never Ends-
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Kaguya-sama: Love Is War -The First Kiss That Never Ends- (2022) as a animation theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The animation and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Quintessential Quintuplets Movie
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Kaguya-sama: Love Is War -The First Kiss That Never Ends- clicked for you, The Quintessential Quintuplets Movie (2022) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.
